prior_outcome_use: lineage and frozen economics only; prior event rows and returns are forbidden inputs; this is an outcome-informed historical replication, not an outcome-blind hypothesis

economic_contract.chairman: exactly one active chairman; begin_date strictly before signal; vice and honorary titles excluded; conservative upper age strictly below 40
economic_contract.listing_age: signal_date is on or after list_date and strictly before the third calendar-year anniversary
economic_contract.technical: adjusted-close MA5 crosses strictly above MA10 on signal_date and adjusted close is strictly below the arithmetic mean of exactly the latest 30 completed prior calendar-week closes; current week excluded
economic_contract.event_overlap: per symbol and horizon; every new signal_date at or before the prior fixed exit_date is excluded, including an exit-day signal

pit_contract.availability_rule: every used row, coverage proof, source revision, calendar row, adjusted bar and corporate-action identity must be immutable and available no later than its frozen cutoff
pit_contract.missing_or_late_rule: BLOCKED; never impute, reuse the preselected 447 events, or substitute current management state
pit_contract.suspension_rule: known suspension at the next accepted entry session makes the signal ineligible
pit_contract.limit_rule: known limit-up at the next accepted entry session makes the signal non-executable; exit gaps or delisting before a horizon are censored and never imputed

stop_rules: stop before outcome access if any PIT domain is missing, late, mutable, incomplete or cross-snapshot-unbound
stop if chairman identity is ambiguous or birthday precision cannot prove age below 40
stop if raw and adjusted bars, accepted calendar, delisting handling or corporate-action lineage cannot be tied
